title: Bliss SMP
description: this is a minecraft mod with magical gems with abilities and passives
body:
this is a minecraft mod that adds 9 new gems to the game being
fire, speed, strength, life, flux, wealth, astra, puff, and wither


each of these gems has unique abilities that come with them and passives while the gems are in the offhand slot

the strength gem
PASSIVES
at tier 1 it gives you strength while its in your offhand
at tier 2 it gives player strength 2 while in offhand
ABILITIES
when used, any player around will get wither 1 - 2 and weakness 1 - 2
shoots 5 high speeed wither heads

the fire gem
PASSIVES
gives fire resistance while in the offhand
ABILITIES
shoots 5 fireballs consecutively
make players and mobs in a certain range rise into the air with blindness

the life gem
PASSIVES
regeneration 1 - 2 while in offhand
ABILITIES
gain extra row of hearts, heal back to full health, and give enemies weakness
heal up to full health

the speed gem
PASSIVES
gives speed 1 - 2 while in offhand
ABILITIES
gain speed 3 and give others slowness 2
cooldown players in a radius of their gems

the wealth gem
PASSIVES
gives hero of the village 1 - 2 while in offhand
ABILITIES
gives other players a cooldown on their gem

the puff gem
PASSIVES
no fall damage while in offhand(you cant use the mace)
ABILITIES
levitates entities into the air
grant slow falling 4 (useful for traps)

the flux gem
PASSIVES
grants dolphins grace 2 while in offhand
ABILITIES
gain haste 5 and dolphins grace 6 for a short peiriod of time

the astra gem
PASSIVES
gain resistance 1 - 2 while in offhand
ABILITIES
shoot a spray of spectral arrows
gain acess to spectator mode for 5 seconds

the wither gem (broken dont use on servers)
WARNING
this gem is broken and should not be used on servers

PASSIVES
gain resistance 2 - 3 while in offhand
ABILITIES
gain immortality for 10 seconds
shoot high speed, spectral arrow

there is traders and a way to upgrade the gems using
4 diamonds, 2 echo shards, 2 netherite ingots, and the tier 1 gem of your choice.

there are also 7 orbs which you can get from the orb trader

orbs are a consumabe non stackable item that grants the player powers for a short period of time

orb of weaving
lets you move throuh cobwebs faster
orb of strength
gives the user/player strength
orb of speed
gives the user/player speed
orb of resistance
grants the player immortality for 5 sec
orb of leaping
grants the player jump boost to reach high places
orb of velocity
makes you take no knockback and makes others take more knockback
orb of healing
gives you 5 extra hearts and heals you up
